name: TF2 RPG / Cast
description:
I tried to cover everything about the team! Made everything as accurate as I could so I hope you enjoy :>

-Updated! Includes Miss Pauling! Should also be much more accurate now :)-

[Note! For best results, please be descriptive and use first person. Third person is possible, but it may get confused!]
-When speaking in third person, please address yourself by name!-
-Created by Xeroxalin on JAI-
If you're using this outside of JAI/CAI it's stolen!
